news.headline: Beccacece goes from brink to World Cup history with Ecuador
news.desc: Sebastian Beccacece was on the verge of losing his job as Ecuador head coach as the clock ticked down against Germany - now he has a last-32 match to look forward to.

news.headline: James doubtful for Panama but England hopeful on Rice
news.desc: England's Reece James and Declan Rice miss England's penultimate training session before Panama with injury concerns.

news.headline: 'We could call it racist' - Ivory Coast boss sad at Schweinsteiger comments
news.desc: Ivory Coast boss Emerse Fae says comments from ex-Germany midfielder Bastian Schweinsteiger about their "wild" playing style could be considered racist.

news.headline: The games that show the flaws in a 48-team World Cup

news.headline: Why it's time for Saka and Rashford - Shearer
news.desc: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why Thomas Tuchel needs to change some personnel as well as his team's mindset when they face Panama.

news.headline: Stay or go home? Tartan Army in limbo as Scotland await fate
news.desc: BBC Scotland examines options for the Tartan Army in Miami as Scotland wait to discover if their World Cup adventure will continue or not.

news.headline: Quiz: How well do you know birthday boy Messi at World Cups?

news.headline: Is the World Cup ball making it hard for goalkeepers?
news.desc: While some goalkeepers have produced heroic performances in the World Cup, others have struggled with shots from outside the area, so is there a problem with the ball?
